name: superdocs
description: Edit, draft, search, summarize, and export styled documents (.docx / PDF / HTML / Markdown / RTF) via the SuperDocs MCP server. Single install bundles 21 MCP tools, 5 user-invocable workflow prompts, and a skill that auto-loads when document work is requested.

api_key.title: SuperDocs API Key
api_key.description: Your sk_ API key from https://use.superdocs.app/ → Settings → API Keys → Create. Stored securely in your OS keychain (never in plaintext config). Free plan includes 500 AI operations per month.
